mapper.sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PS.PERSONID , PS.DISPLAYNAME , EM.EMAILADDRESS FROM PERSON AS PS LEFT OUTER JOIN EMAIL AS EM ON PS.PERSONID=EM.PERSONID )

where.if: AND ( PERSONID LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{KEYWORD}) || '%' OR DISPLAYNAME LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{KEYWORD}) || '%' OR EMAILADDRESS LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{KEYWORD}) || '%' )

mapper.select: SELECT GROUPNAME AS CODE_ID , DESCRIPTION AS CODE_NM FROM MAXGROUP WHERE GROUPNAME IN ('KBSRADM', 'KBSRUSER')

SELECT GU.USERID AS PERSONID , PS.DISPLAYNAME , EM.EMAILADDRESS FROM GROUPUSER AS GU LEFT OUTER JOIN PERSON AS PS ON GU.USERID=PS.PERSONID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMAIL AS EM ON GU.USERID=EM.PERSONID WHERE GROUPNAME = #{GROUPNAME}
SELECT LOGINID , PASSWORD , B.DISPLAYNAME , C.EMAILADDRESS FROM MAXUSER A, PERSON B, EMAIL C WHERE A.PERSONID = B.PERSONID AND B.PERSONID = C.PERSONID AND A.LOGINID = #{LOGINID}
SELECT GROUPNAME FROM GROUPUSER WHERE UPPER(USERID) = UPPER(#{LOGINID})
